name: The Purge (horror movies) RPG
description:
“Once a year, for twelve hours… all crime is legal.”

The sirens will sound. The streets will empty — except for the hunters, the looters, the masked strangers lurking in the shadows. No laws. No police. No hospitals. Murder, torture, theft… every sin is allowed, and every nightmare becomes real.

You can hide. You can fight. You can hunt. But remember… they can do the same to you.

When the Purge begins, there’s only one rule: survive until dawn… or don’t.
creator: Kitty Kat 666
